name: bounty-board-v3
description: Bounty Board v3 — Hot Wallet model with fund request system

sessions.summary: Updated all four files (api.py, index.html, app.js, style.css) to implement the hot wallet model: single shared USDC address on Base L2, manual deposit/withdraw request system with admin review, fund_requests table, new admin Fund Requests tab, OOB quest admin confirm-payment endpoint, removed per-user ETH wallets, new users start at $0.
